semantics.label: Task description
semantics.description: Prompt shown above the drawing canvas. May contain HTML.

fields.label: Background image
fields.description: Optional image displayed behind the learner's drawing (e.g. graph paper, photo to annotate, or outline to trace).

fields.label: Reference / solution image
fields.description: Optional image revealed when the learner clicks 'Show solution'. Use this to show the expected drawing.

fields.label: Drawing alternative text
fields.description: Describes the canvas for screen reader users. Empty falls back to the task description.

fields.label: Canvas base width (px)
fields.description: The canvas scales responsively but uses this value to set its internal aspect.

fields.label: Canvas background color
fields.description: CSS color used when no background image is set.

fields.label: Enable 'Show solution' button
fields.description: Only effective if a reference image is configured.

fields.label: Lock canvas after submit
fields.description: Prevents further editing once the drawing has been submitted (until retry).
